As for the plant with a similar name, Leucostegia decipiens, I can provide you with general information about ferns. Ferns are vascular plants that reproduce via spores, and they have been used in traditional medicine for various health benefits. Some of the health benefits of ferns include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties.

The bioactive constituents of ferns include various compounds such as flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids.
